name: morphius-forge
description: Public-safe module creation kit for building plug-and-play Morphius modules
author: Levente Daniel Feher

scripts.validate:examples: node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate examples/prompt-cleaner && node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate examples/output-validator && node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate examples/demo-auth-provider && node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate examples/demo-llm-connector
